query:
INSERT INTO product_batches (batchCode, productId, customerId, customRequirements, fobSellingPrice, productionStatus, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 'SB-002-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 4), 'Navy blue velvet with gold leg finish upgrade', 440.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-002-NVY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-002-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 5), 'Custom dimensions: 220cm length instead of 210cm', 455.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-002-NVY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-002-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 6), 'Standard version, premium packaging', 425.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-002-NVY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-002-B004', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 7), 'Bulk order 50+ units, volume discount', 385.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-002-NVY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-002-B005', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 8), 'Custom fabric color: midnight blue', 435.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-002-NVY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-003-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 9), 'Beige linen with stain-resistant coating', 330.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-003-BGE'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-003-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 10), 'Custom armrest height adjustment', 340.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-003-BGE'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-003-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 11), 'Standard version, express shipping', 315.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-003-BGE'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-003-B004', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 12), 'Bulk order discount, 30+ units', 285.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-003-BGE'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-004-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 13), 'Charcoal fabric with extra storage compartments', 590.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-004-CHR'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-004-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 14), 'Custom chaise lounge orientation (left instead of right)', 580.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-004-CHR'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-004-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 15), 'Standard version with premium chrome legs', 565.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-004-CHR'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-004-B004', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 16), 'Bulk order 20+ units, volume pricing', 505.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-004-CHR'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-004-B005', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 17), 'Custom fabric upgrade: charcoal velvet', 610.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-004-CHR'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-005-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 18), 'Teal blue fabric with darker shade variation', 255.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-005-TEA'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-005-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 19), 'Standard version, custom packaging', 245.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-005-TEA'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-005-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0), 'Bulk order 40+ units, discounted rate', 215.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-005-TEA';
